headline: Micron, Broadcom, Palantir, Delta, SpaceX, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
summary: Stocks fall broadly as the Iran war cease-fire appears to be over. Crude prices rise, pushing many oil stocks higher.

headline: EnerCom Announces Liberty Energy as a Keynote Speaker at the 31st Annual EnerCom Denver- The Energy Investment Conference, August 17-19, 2026, in Denver, Colorado
summary: EnerCom, Inc. ("EnerCom") is pleased to announce that Ron Gusek, CEO of industry leader Liberty Energy, has been confirmed as a keynote speaker at the 31st annual EnerCom Denver – The Energy Investment Conference, taking place August 17-19, 2026, at the Westin Denver Downtown.

headline: Don't see the prospects for peace in the Middle East, says Ariel Investments' Charles Bobrinskoy
